name: Alchemy + Chaos spam (Normal start)
description: Brute-force a rare amulet by alching once, then Chaos-swapping bad mods one at a time until usable. No guarantees, but cheap and fast when essences aren't available.

steps.outcome: Upgrades the amulet to rare with 4 random modifiers.

Each Chaos Orb removes one random modifier and adds a new random one (single-mod swap, not a full reroll). Keep using when you still have a clearly bad mod; stop once the item is workable. Set a hard chaos budget — variance can be wild.

notes_for_user: Maximum variance path. Chaos in PoE2 is a one-at-a-time swap, so you can chip away at specific bad mods rather than rerolling the whole item every time. Advanced: 'Omen of Whittling' targets the lowest-tier mod for removal, and 'Omen of Sinistral/Dextral Erasure' restricts removal to prefixes or suffixes only — both make Chaos targeted rather than random.
